Methodology:
  Random baseline = min(1, 5/fileCount) — probability of a random 5-file selection containing the target
  Correct = target file is rank-1 result
  Partial = target file in ranks 2–5
  Wrong   = target file not in top-5
  No LLM API used. All scores are retrieval rank math.
